source.body_text_sample:
About
Our Team
Why Us
Careers
Contact
The Kanata Learning Centre

We provide individualized, evidence-based support for children with learning and developmental needs. We focus on targeted interventions and accommodations that build academic skills, confidence, and independence. Our services include ongoing learning support and skill building, and, when appropriate, psychoeducational assessments to better understand each child’s strengths and challenges.

It is not too late to sign up to keep that brain fresh all summer, in a fun, engaging environment.

Summer Learning! Intakes Open! Catch up, keep up or reach ahead!

Click the 'Book Consultation' button below, and we will contact you to learn more about your child.

Book a Consultation

Our services are offered Monday to Sunday, and are supervised by Registered School and Clinical Psychologist, Dr. Rebecca Moore. Not only does this mean your child’s progress and program is monitored by our psychologist, it also means that all of our services are claimable under most benefit plans.

We offer education services Mondays through Friday from 8am - 8pm as well as Saturday and Sunday 8am - 3pm.

All of our full services are available as in person sessions, or remote sessions.

Learn More

 
Is your child struggling or refusing to attend school?

We offer daytime sessions tailored to students who are unable to attend school on a regular basis, for any reason.

Do you need support in navigating the school system and understanding you
